subject: UX & Research
title: Change Blindness
description: Learn Change Blindness in one minute.

hook.text: A researcher swaps the person behind a counter mid-conversation. 75% of people don't notice.

buildup.text: This is change blindness: when something changes during a disruption, our brain fills in the gap.

discovery.text: Websites exploit this constantly. A page reload subtly changes layout, and users never realize it.

twist.text: But change blindness fails when the change matters to the user's goal. Price changes get noticed fast.

climax.text: Designers use this: keep important changes visible and animated so users don't miss what matters.

punchline.text: If it matters, animate it. Silent changes get missed.

quiz.question: What is change blindness?
options: Failing to notice changes during a visual disruption
Being unable to see colors correctly
Ignoring all changes on a screen
